{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "manni pee mannas Galwas
Matteem. Un tas Gars zehle
manni starp Semmt un starp
Debbefi/ un wedde man us Je-
rnsalemi/ eekſch tahm Deewa Pa-
rahdtchanahm/ preekſch ta eek-
fcheja Pagalmja Wahrtu Dur-
wim/ kas prett Seemeli stahw/
tur bija likta weena Elka-Bilde
par Reebſchanu tam Namma-
Kungam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Un raugi/ ta Gohdiba ta
Israëka Deewa bija tur ta patt/
ka es to biju Eeleliä redſejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Tu Zilweka Behrns/ pazell jelle
tawas Azzis us to Zeltu prett
Seemet. Un es pazehlu ſawas
Azzis us to Zeltu prett Seeme-
ſti/ un raugi/ prett Seemeta-
Puffi pee ta Altara Wahrtim
bija fchi Elka-Bilde tahs Reeb-
tchanas/ kur eekſchä ja-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Tu Zilweka Behrns/ ar tu redſi
tahs leelas Negantibas/ ko tas
Israëka Namã ſcheit darra? ka
man no mannas twehtas Wee-
tas irr tahtu ja-atſeet / tomehr
tu redſefi wehl leelakas Negan-
tibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Tad wedde wiꞥſch manni
pee Pagalmja Durwim/ tad red-
dſeju es/ un raugi/ tur bija Zau-
rungs Seena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Tu Zilweka Behrns/ rohzi jelle
zaur to Seenu/ un es raffu zaar
to Seenu/ un raugi/ tur bija wee-
nas Durwis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Tad fazzija wiꞥſch
manni: Efj eekſchä/ un l
tahs niknas Negantibas/ ko
ſche darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tad gahju es eekſchä
redſeju/ un raugi/ tur bija
ſadas Bildes no leenam
Tahrpeem/ un neganti Sn-
ri/ un wiſſadi Suhdu-De-
ta Israëka Namma / wiſg
kahrt to Seenu rakſiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un ſeptinDefinitis W
no teem Wezzajeeem ta Isra-
Mamma/ ar Jasaniju Saw-
Dehlu ſtahweja winro Wid-
un apſtahjahs preekſch winne-
un ikweens turreja ſawu Kive-
ja-Trauku ſawa Rohkä/ un
Twaiſs uskahpe ka Padebbes-
tahs Kwehpinaſchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tad fazzija wiꞥſch
man: Efj tu redſejs tu Zilwe-
Behrns/ ko tee Wezzajee ta
fraëka Namma darra Tumfibi-
ikweens ſawã iſrakſtitã Kamb-
ri? Jo tee fakka: Tas KUM-
muhs ne reds/ tas KUNGS i
no tahs Semmes atſiahjees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Tu redſefi wehl leelakas Negan-
tibas/ ko tee darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un wiꞥſch wedde man-
pee ta KUNGA Namma Wah-
tu Durwim/ kas prett Seeme-
ſtahw/ un raugi/ tur fehdej-
Seewas/ tahs apraudaja t
Tahmusu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Efj tu to redſejs tu Zilwe-
Behrns? tu redſeti wehl leela-
ka
"
    }
  ],
